allow: PowerShell(Test-Path "x:\\www\\package.json"; if \(Test-Path "x:\\www\\package.json"\) { Get-Content "x:\\www\\package.json" }; Get-ChildItem "x:\\www\\node_modules\\googleapis\\package.json" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { \(Get-Content $_.FullName | ConvertFrom-Json\).version })
